content_body: My family and I had such a wonderful experience at this lovely cabin. There was me, my sister, my friend, his dad, and his brother. It fit all of us perfectly. On Saturday, we arrived at about 6 PM so we spent the whole night playing card games, playing pool, and going in the hot tub. The view is breathtaking, and I loved watching the sunset. Throughout this trip, we also went fishing on a pontoon boat (my favorite part), went to the fairgrounds where they had a wonderful carnival, and also went tubing. This was a great week to just relax and spend quality time with family. We loved grilling and spending time on the porches.I love this place so much. Thank you for such a wonderful place to stay—it was totally worth the 9-hour drive! Some days we would just play peaceful music while on the porch. It was so much fun. I love the piano, too! I just love everything!
title: "I Love This Place So Much"
